name: Practice Makes Perfect

spell.name: Practice Makes Perfect
spell.trigger: You or an ally within range fails a skill check for a skill in which you or they are trained.

text: The target gains a +2 status bonus to the triggering check, or a +3 bonus if the target has master or better proficiency in the skill. This bonus can change the outcome of the target’s skill check.
